text:
Market today: Oil is the main driver, with prices fluctuating on geopolitical news. This can impact broader market sentiment and potentially tech names.

Your holdings: SOXL is a SELL at -28.99% and SPAL is a NEW position at -34.45%. Both are leveraged ETFs and decay is a concern, especially on margin.

Watch: Keep an eye on AVGO, which has an ACCUMULATE rating in the scanner and is trading in a daily discount.

Bottom line: Manage your leveraged positions closely and watch for opportunities in strong semiconductor names.
plays: SOXL: Trim or exit this leveraged ETF given its current status and -28.99% PnL.
SPAL: Consider trimming this new leveraged ETF position at -34.45% PnL due to its volatility and decay.
AVGO: Consider entry at 392.94-392.54 with a stop at 390.7, per scanner setup.
